title: Regolamenti dwar il-Kontroll tal-Carnation Leaf Rollers Imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 238 tal-2022
title_en: Regolamenti dwar il-Kontroll tal-Carnation Leaf Rollers Imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 238 tal-2022
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/433.6/mlt, expression eli/sl/433.6/20220920/mlt).

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
KONTROLL TAL-CARNATION LEAF ROLLERS

[L.S.433.06

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 433.06
REGOLAMENTI DWAR IL-KONTROLL
TAL-CARNATION LEAF ROLLERS**
1 ta’ April, 2004
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 128 ta’ l-2004.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 238 tal-2022.

1
